name: Tesson Holdings Limited
summary: Tesson Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the lithium-ion motive battery business in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Lithium Ion Motive Battery Business, and Property and Cultural Business. The company manufactures, sells, and trades in lithium-ion motive batteries, lithium-ion battery modules, battery charging devices, and battery material machines and production lines. It also provides new energy solutions and related equipment, such as electric passenger car power battery, electric logistics vehicle power battery, electric passenger car power battery, electric tool power battery, garden tool power battery, industrial energy storage, and home energy storage systems for the use in new energy vehicles, energy storage, aerospace, military equipment, electric motorcycle and special vehicle, and electric equipment applications. In addition, the company is involved in the sale of equipment; import and export trading activities; and operation of research and development center. Further, it engages in the planning and organization of cultural events, performance creativity and execution, creation and shooting of documentary film and TV works, museum creative planning, design and construction, execution of the combination of cultural, business, and tourism, etc., as well as event production and themed museums, and architectural design and engineering businesses; property holding activities; and property development activities comprising industrial residential projects. The company was formerly known as Kith Holdings Limited and changed its name to Tesson Holdings Limited in June 2015. Tesson Holdings Limited was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. Tesson Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Double Key International Limited.
